analysis.elliott_wave: No applicable Elliott Wave pattern assessment due to gold's unique market behavior.
analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with a 40.16 RSI reading, but a 1.20% price drop in the last 24 hours suggests a possible bearish trend continuation.
